statement.p: A gym charges members {\$20} for a registration fee, and then {\$36} per month. You became a member some time ago, and now you have paid a total of {\$704} to the gym. How many months have passed since you joined the gym?
months have passed since you joined the gym.

solution.p: Let x be the number of months since you became a member of the gym.
If you pay {\$36} per month, you would pay 36 \cdot x dollars for x months. In addition, you paid {\$20} up front.
Now we can write an equation:
19 months have passed since you joined the gym.
